response:
KEEP THE AREA CLEAN: BRUSH GENTLY AND THOROUGHLY. RINSE MOUTH WITH WATER AFTER MEALS. CLEAN TOOTH TO PREVENT MORE DAMAGE. *HIGHLIGHTED SECTION*

* * *

AVOID CERTAIN FOODS: STAY AWAY FROM HARD OR STICKY ITEMS. CHOOSE SOFT FOODS TO REDUCE PAIN. EAT LESS TO PREVENT MORE HARM. *HIGHLIGHTED SECTION*

* * *

USE TEMPORARY FILLING MATERIALS: APPLY OVER-THE-COUNTER BOX TO FILL VOID. FOLLOW INSTRUCTIONS TO AVOID MORE PROBLEMS. CAR CAN BE USED FOR TEMPORARY SOLUTION. *HIGHLIGHTED SECTION*

MONITOR FOR CHANGES: LOOK FOR INCREASED PAIN OR SWELLING. NOTICE BAD TASTE OR FEVER TO SEEK HELP. TRADITION MAY VARY BUT DENTAL CARE IS ESSENTIAL. *HIGHLIGHTED SECTION*

SEEK DENTAL CARE: FIND LOCAL OPTIONS OR DENTAL SCHOOLS. TWO OPTIONS CAN HELP YOU GET HELP. DON’T DELAY TREATMENT TO AVOID SEVERE ISSUES. *HIGHLIGHTED SECTION*
